verified_invariants.note: Aborted Google Analytics requests in headless Chromium are external telemetry noise, not ViewLoom route failures.

defects.title: History metric switching does not update every metric-dependent surface
reproduction: Open History with Viewer-minutes.
Switch to Peak viewers.
Confirm URL, selected control, chart caption, and chart aria label change.
Confirm period summary and selected-day facts remain byte-for-byte unchanged.
defects.missing_assertion: No permanent gate requires chart, summary, selected day, ranking meaning, archives, and outputs to change together when the primary metric changes.

defects.title: History does not provide a reliable first keyboard-focus entry in production
reproduction: Open either production History route.
Press Tab once.
The active element remains body/document instead of moving to a visible actionable element.
defects.missing_assertion: No consolidated History gate rejects a page whose first Tab does not enter an actionable, visibly focused control.

defects.title: History does not yet present one coherent task hierarchy across desktop and mobile
reproduction: Open a production History Overview.
On desktop, inspect the full-page order and the separation between chart, selected day, comparison, calendar, ranking, changes, and coverage.
On mobile, inspect the full-page stack; desktop sections become a very long sequence and primary analysis tasks are not prioritized into a compact mobile flow.
defects.missing_assertion: Existing checks prove element presence and no horizontal overflow, but do not reject an excessively long or weakly prioritized task flow.

defects.title: Visible mobile controls are below the 44px audit target
reproduction: Open the required mobile matrix.
Measure visible buttons and button-styled links.
Controls including the mobile menu, feature controls, zoom controls, and action links are commonly 34–42px high.
defects.missing_assertion: No all-route mobile target-size gate exists.

defects.title: Both Watchlist routes are omitted from general Public Readiness
reproduction: Compare P8A owned routes with apps/web/scripts/public-readiness-audit.mjs.
defects.missing_assertion: General Public Readiness does not enumerate both Watchlist routes.
next: Phase 10 or narrow maintenance after P9H0 entry

defects.title: General Production Smoke omits owned public route groups
reproduction: Compare the P8A route inventory with .github/workflows/production-smoke.yml.
defects.missing_assertion: General smoke does not exercise every owned route group.

defects.title: Required repository-owned release-policy routes are absent
reproduction: Open each route in production.
Each returns the owned 404 page.
existing_gates: none that can pass release readiness
defects.missing_assertion: Release readiness cannot pass without dedicated policy and disclosure surfaces.
next: R12A; do not interrupt P9H0 unless external compliance requires it

defects.title: Day Flow exposes a visible date input without an accessible name
reproduction: Open Day Flow at each required width.
Inspect the visible date input.
The input has no aria-label, title, text content, name, or placeholder exposed by the audit.
owner: Day Flow route controls and shared control styles
defects.missing_assertion: No consolidated public-route accessible-name audit exists.
next: Phase 10 or narrow repair if it blocks P1 acceptance

ordered_phase_9_queue.purpose: Reproduce all History P1 defects, trace owners, and commit failing permanent gates.
Synchronize Viewer-minutes and Peak viewers across every metric-dependent surface.
Lock chart scale, units, ticks, day controls, and accessible interpretation even though the P8B deterministic fixture currently satisfies the basic count contract.
Repair summary, selected-day, and Overview task hierarchy.
Repair Archives and Report & Export task content while preserving the verified no-refetch and Back/Forward contracts.
Repair keyboard entry, mobile task hierarchy, responsive density, and accessibility.
Run complete local candidate and regression lock.
Run deliberate Preview and exact production acceptance.
